chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-610 of 2017. Cr. Bail Application No.S-567 of 2017. Cr. Bail Application No.S-787 of 2017. Cr. Bail Application No.S-46 of 2018. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Bail Applications. 09-07-2018. Mr. Abdul Bari Panhwar advocate for applicants in No. S-610/2017, Cr. B.A No. S-567/2017 and Cr. S-46/2018. Mr. Muhammad AyazMarri advocate for applicant in No. S-46 of 2018. Mr. NajeebullahJalbani advocate for applicant in Application No. S-787/2017. Mr. Fakir Faiz Muhammad Leghari, advoca complainant. Mr. Abdul RehmanKolachi, Deputy Prosecutor Genera.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Applicant Ahmed in Cr. B.A No.S-610/2017, applicantsAli Baig alias Ali, AsadBaig alias Asad and Mujeeb- ur-Rehman in Cr. B.A No.S-567/2017 andapplicant Rajibuddin in Cr. B.A No. S-787/2017are present along with their counsels. Heard arguments.Reserved for Order. Adjourned to 16-07-2018. Judge Nasim/P.A
